Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Mental Examination (Neuropsychological Examination With Dr. William Hooker) (Ccp 2032.010 Et. Seq., And 2032.310 Et. Seq)
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Ross McKissick, Esq. (415.495.0440; ross@harrispersonalinjury.com) of Harris Personal Injury Lawyers, Inc. for Plaintiff.
David Delbon, Esq. (415.554.3962; david.delbon@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and FRED ROYBAL III's Motion For Order Compelling Mental Examination (Neuropsychological Examination With Dr. William Hooker) (Ccp 2032.010 Et. Seq., And 2032.310 Et. Seq) is taken under submission.
